name: gnome-provider-limits
description: GNOME Shell extension that shows session limits of multiple AI coding providers (Codex, Claude, OpenCode) in the top bar.

scripts.pack: npm run build && npm run schema:compile && gnome-extensions pack dist/ -o dist/ --schema src/schemas/org.gnome.shell.extensions.gnome-provider-limits.gschema.xml --podir src/po --gettext-domain gnome-provider-limits
scripts.install:local: npm run pack && gnome-extensions install --force dist/*.zip
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test
